def predict(key, box) -> bool:
    # Choose one specific key per box to minimize attempts:
    # - red box: red key (color match)
    # - pink box: cloud key (shape match)
    # - white box: diamond key (shape match)
    # - purple box: heart key (shape match)
    # - blue box: triangle key (shape match)
    mapping = {
        "red": "red",
        "pink": "cloud",
        "white": "diamond",
        "purple": "heart",

    expected_key_id = mapping.get(box.id)
    return key.id == expected_key_id
